title: Honeycomb SLO
description: Represents a Service Level Objective in Honeycomb, including the SLI query, target percentage, time period, and associated burn alerts for monitoring error budget consumption.

name.description: The display name of the SLO.

description.description: A human-readable description of what the SLO measures.

sli.description: The Service Level Indicator query specification that defines how to measure the SLO.

target_percentage.description: The target percentage for the SLO, such as 99.9 for three nines availability.

time_period_days.description: The rolling time period in days over which the SLO is evaluated.

created_at.description: ISO8601 formatted time the SLO was created.

updated_at.description: ISO8601 formatted time the SLO was last updated.

BurnAlert.description: A burn alert that notifies recipients when the SLO error budget is being consumed too quickly.

id.description: Unique identifier for the burn alert.

slo_id.description: The ID of the SLO this burn alert monitors.

exhaustion_minutes.description: For exhaustion_time alerts, the number of minutes before budget exhaustion that triggers the alert.

budget_rate_window_minutes.description: For budget_rate alerts, the window in minutes over which to measure the burn rate.

budget_rate_decrease_percent.description: For budget_rate alerts, the percentage decrease in budget that triggers the alert.

recipients.description: List of recipients to notify when the burn alert fires.

created_at.description: ISO8601 formatted time the burn alert was created.

updated_at.description: ISO8601 formatted time the burn alert was last updated.

RecipientRef.description: A reference to a notification recipient.

id.description: The ID of the recipient to notify.

slo_id.description: The ID of the SLO this report is for.

budget_remaining.description: The remaining error budget as a percentage.

budget_used.description: The used error budget as a percentage.

time_period_days.description: The time period in days for the report.
